name: McpTodo-PowerShell
description: PowerShell module for MCP Todo API. Provides cmdlets: Initialize-McpTodo, Get-McpTodo, Get-McpTodoPrompt, New-McpTodo, Update-McpTodo, Complete-McpTodo, Remove-McpTodo, Add-McpTodoRequirements. Save to McpTodo.psm1 and Import-Module.
commandTemplate: Save this module to McpTodo.psm1, then: Import-Module ./McpTodo.psm1; Initialize-McpTodo
